title: GitLab security advisory (AV26-327)
description: On April 8, 2026, GitLab published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitLab Community Edition (CE) - versions prior to 18.10.3, 18.9.5 and 18.8.9
GitLab Enterprise Edition (EE) - versions prior to 18.10.3, 18.9.5 and 18.8.9
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
